section.heading: Providing information to Congress

content.p: Nothing in this subchapter may be construed as authority to withhold information from the Congress or from a committee of either House of Congress.

section.sourceCredit: (July 26, 1947, ch. 343, title VI, § 604, formerly § 605, as added Pub. L. 97–200, § 2(a), June 23, 1982, 96 Stat. 123; renumbered § 604, Pub. L. 112–277, title III, § 310(a)(4)(B), Jan. 14, 2013, 126 Stat. 2475.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 425 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 604 of act July 26, 1947, was renumbered section 603 and is classified to section 3124 of this title.
